pages.raw_text:
An extreme example of dislike
for the Washington Water Power
company from an organized labor
standpoint was shown today when
number of employees of contractor
Use refused to work along side of
men employed by the company. Mr..
Use Is engaged in excavating for
foundation on East Sprague
street and the Washington Water
Power company needed the dirt for
grading purposes. The company
agreed to haul away the dirt If
permitted to do so and this propo.
sition was accepted by Use. How
ever. when the men employed by
the Washington Water Power peo-
pie started work in the same ex.
cavation with the union men in
the employ of the contractor trou.
Bile ensued, the unionists wanting
to quit. Just how the trouble will
be ended has not been settled.
